name: Linda w. German Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. While the potatoes are cooking, chop celery and set aside.
2. Chop onions and set aside.
3. Fry bacon until crispy, then chop into small pieces and set aside.
4. Remove the bacon fat, add chopped onions to the fat, and sauté until softened.
5. Remove onions from the pan and discard the remaining fat.
6. Return 1/3 cup of the bacon fat to the pan.
7. Add flour and cook for a few minutes until lightly browned.
8. Gradually whisk in vinegar, water, sugar, salt, and pepper. Continue cooking until the mixture thickens slightly.
9. Peel the potatoes and cut into slices while still hot. Sprinkle with 2 tablespoons of salt and set aside to cool.
10. Combine the onions, celery, bacon, and dressing with the potato slices. Let the salad stand for several hours so that flavors can meld together.
11. Garnish with additional bacon or parsley if desired.
